\CommentTok{\# creating eigenvalues}
\NormalTok{eigenvalues.v }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pca.constituent}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sdev}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{2}

\NormalTok{perc\_variance.v }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ eigenvalues.v}\SpecialCharTok{/}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(eigenvalues.v)}
\NormalTok{perc\_variance.v }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{perc\_variance.v,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cumulative\_perc\_var.v }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cumsum}\NormalTok{(perc\_variance.v)}

\NormalTok{eigenvalues.constituent }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
\AttributeTok{PC =} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(eigenvalues.v),}
\AttributeTok{Eigenvalue =}\NormalTok{ eigenvalues.v,}
\AttributeTok{Variance =}\NormalTok{ perc\_variance.v,}
\AttributeTok{Cumulative =}\NormalTok{ cumulative\_perc\_var.v)}

\NormalTok{eigenvalues.constituent}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Step 2: Factor Analysis

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fa\_3.oblique }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fa}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  phthalates\_scaled,}
  \AttributeTok{nfactors =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{rotate =} \StringTok{"promax"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{scores =} \StringTok{"regression"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{fm =} \StringTok{"ml"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fa\_3.oblique}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
## Factor Analysis using method =  ml

##     fm = "ml")

## MCPP  -0.03  0.15  0.80 0.77 0.231 1.1
## MEP   -0.04  0.58  0.09 0.36 0.640 1.1

## MEHP   0.80 -0.02 -0.01 0.61 0.391 1.0

## MEOHP  0.89  0.13 -0.02 0.97 0.027 1.0
## MBZP   0.09  0.57  0.10 0.49 0.505 1.1
## 
##                        ML1  ML3  ML2
## SS loadings           3.39 2.62 2.25
## Proportion Var        0.31 0.24 0.20
## Cumulative Var        0.31 0.55 0.75
## Proportion Explained  0.41 0.32 0.27
## Cumulative Proportion 0.41 0.73 1.00
## 
##  With factor correlations of 
##      ML1  ML3  ML2
## ML1 1.00 0.77 0.65
## ML3 0.77 1.00 0.60
## ML2 0.65 0.60 1.00
## 
## Mean item complexity =  1.1
## Test of the hypothesis that 3 factors are sufficient.
## 
## df null model =  55  with the objective function =  11.7 with Chi Square =  1960.33
## df of  the model are 25  and the objective function was  0.19 
## 
## The root mean square of the residuals (RMSR) is  0.02 
## The df corrected root mean square of the residuals is  0.03 
## 
## The harmonic n.obs is  173 with the empirical chi square  3.6  with prob <  1 
## The total n.obs was  173  with Likelihood Chi Square =  30.91  with prob <  0.19 
## 
## Tucker Lewis Index of factoring reliability =  0.993
## RMSEA index =  0.037  and the 90 % confidence intervals are  0 0.075
## BIC =  -97.92
## Fit based upon off diagonal values = 1
## Measures of factor score adequacy             
##                                                    ML1  ML3  ML2
## Correlation of (regression) scores with factors   0.82 0.85 0.99

\subsection{Now taking factor group membership and seeing how its
associated with reproductive health outcomes by running regression
models}\label{now-taking-factor-group-membership-and-seeing-how-its-associated-with-reproductive-health-outcomes-by-running-regression-models}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\#renaming groups}
\NormalTok{scores }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(fa\_3.oblique}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{scores)}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(scores) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"F1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"F2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"F3"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\#merge with the main df}
\NormalTok{merged\_factor\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cbind}\NormalTok{(phthalates\_scaled, scores)}

\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\#merging back with data}
\NormalTok{merged\_factor\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged\_factor\_df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cbind}\NormalTok{(phthalates\_scaled, demo)}

\CommentTok{\#linear regression for age of menarche}
\NormalTok{model\_menarche }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lm}\NormalTok{(Age\_FirstPeriod }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ F1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ F2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ F3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ Race }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ Age }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ Year, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ merged\_factor\_df)}
\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(model\_menarche)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
